w:r.w:t: College and university students interested in improving argumentation, critical thinking, and debate skills.
DebateMe is a gamified AI debate platform where users challenge AI opponents in structured debates.
The platform treats debate as an intellectual sport, combining structured debate mechanics with gamification and AI evaluation.
Users debate against distinct AI personas, receive post-match feedback, and build a trackable debate performance profile.
“Debate is a sport. Train your mind.”
DebateMe aims to transform debate practice into an engaging intellectual game. Instead of acting as a normal chatbot, AI functions in two specialized roles:
The Sparring Partner — an AI opponent with unique debating styles.
The Coach — a separate AI system that analyzes debate performance and provides structured feedback.
Through structured debate rounds, gamification, and performance tracking, DebateMe encourages users to improve their reasoning, argumentation, and persuasion skills.
The primary goals of the MVP are:
• Provide a structured AI debate experience
• Encourage critical thinking and logical reasoning
• Deliver meaningful AI feedback after each debate
• Create a strong portfolio-level AI application
To reduce friction and allow users to start debating quickly, the application follows a minimal interaction flow.
The design intentionally avoids complex configuration screens to maintain fast engagement and reduce user drop-off.
The system stores all past debates including:
Users can review past debates to track improvement.
Users enter a custom debate resolution/topic before starting the match.
Users must also select their stance:
Debates follow a turn-based format consisting of multiple rounds.
Each turn requires the user to submit an argument responding to the AI opponent.
During the debate, a special round requires the user to:
Summarize the strongest argument made by the AI opponent.
The AI coach evaluates how accurately the user represented the opposing argument.
To discourage copy-paste answers from external AI tools:
• Paste functionality is disabled in the debate input field.
Instead of traditional difficulty levels, DebateMe uses AI Personas.
Each persona has a unique debating style determined by specialized system prompts.
The AI dynamically adjusts debate intensity based on the user’s argument quality.
Weak arguments → AI becomes more explanatory.
Strong arguments → AI responds with stronger counterpoints.
This system ensures that debates remain engaging for both beginners and experienced users without requiring manual difficulty selection.
After each debate, a separate AI system analyzes the entire transcript.
The user receives a score out of 10 based on:
The AI Coach extracts the user’s Best Moment from the debate.
This is a single argument considered the strongest statement made by the user.
The system also explains why it was effective.
After each match, the app generates a shareable visual card containing:
These cards are optimized for sharing on:
(may be added on a later update):
Each day features a global debate challenge.
Users debate the same topic against a specific AI persona.
Completing the challenge awards bonus Elo points and encourages daily engagement.
Key metrics used to evaluate the MVP:
• Percentage of users completing daily challenges
• Average user score improvements over time
If a user attempts to derail the debate (e.g., “You are just an AI”), the system detects the response as an Ad Hominem fallacy and deducts points.
The AI then redirects the debate back to the topic.
• remain focused on the debate topic
Features planned after the MVP launch include:
University-specific rankings based on student email domains.
Users unlock achievements based on argument quality.
Integration of speech technologies to enable live debates using voice.
Real-time debates between two human users with AI acting as:
User interface for debate interaction and profile management.
Handles authentication, debate sessions, match history, and scoring.
Responsible for generating arguments and evaluating debates.
Stores user profiles, debate transcripts, scores, and rankings.
The MVP focuses on delivering a clean, engaging AI debate experience while keeping development scope manageable.
Future iterations will expand the platform through new social, competitive, and multimedia features.
